ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "home" TEXT /* Hometown of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the athlete */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., road race, time trial) */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance for the category if it differs from the event distance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this result belongs to */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete this result belongs to */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the event */,
  "plate_number" INTEGER /* Plate number of the athlete */,
  "speed_mph" REAL /* Average speed of the athlete in mph */,
  "net_time" TEXT /* Net time of the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the athlete */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the result belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the athlete's performance */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the athlete's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Hometown of the judge */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the judge's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the judge's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this assignment belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge this assignment belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the judge is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result this score belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge this score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the judge */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the score belongs to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES event_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., athlete, judge, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this user belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "home" TEXT /* Hometown of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete this registration belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this registration belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the athlete is registered for */,
  "registration_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the registration fee has been paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_event_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_event_registrations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this prize belongs to */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place this prize is awarded for (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the prize is awarded for */,
  "prize_value" REAL /* Monetary value of the prize */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prize was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prize was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_prizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_prizes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
